texto: Roger Bacon held that three classes of substance were capable of magic: the herbal, the mineral, and the verbal. With their leaves of fiber, their inks of copperas and soot, and their words, books are an amalgam of the three.
explicacao: Citação de Matthew Battles sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Roger Bacon held that three classes of substance were capable of magic: the herbal, the mineral, …” articula reflexao, books, three em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
